positive: A mystical, ornate celestial forest scene. Dominant elements include bioluminescent glowing flora, intricate glowing mushroom clusters, and a central archway formed by twisting roots. The style should be high-contrast graphic illustration mixed with detailed line art, reminiscent of art nouveau stained glass or woodcut engraving. Use a palette of deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and pops of warm gold light. The composition must feature clean, bold silhouettes suitable for central apparel printing, with symmetrical balance and strong graphic impact. Studio lighting, centered composition, highly detailed, poster quality, print-friendly vector look.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, signature, messy, abstract, logo, cartoon, simple background, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, grayscale only
